rationale.R1.6: The agent performed a careful copy-edit pass, improving register and consistency without losing meaning.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged some uncertainties but did not consistently mark confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed within the agreed scope without drifting.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identified harmful patterns in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites were traced, but minor edits lacked annotation.
